data.name: Caroline's Fantasies
data.detailed_description:
Caroline's Fantasies is a real-time-3D Interactive Erotic Story about a beautiful college coed who is selected to Beta Test a new VIRTUAL SEXUAL EXPERIENCE SYSTEM. This system brings her sexiest, naughtiest and even her darkest sexual fantasies to life. Caroline has a wild and vivid sexual imagination, and you get to participate as each separate fantasy comes to life in real-time 3D.



Be there as Caroline experiences the thrill of living out her wildest sexual dreams and desires. Each of Caroline’s Sexual Fantasies is its own separate Erotic short story, with its own interactive experiences, like swimming naked in a beautiful cove with her best friend, or walking through a dark, creepy forest while being stalked by a lust-crazed werewolf.



Caroline’s Fantasies is truly next-generation interactive erotic fiction, with full-Realtime 3D graphics and complete, top-quality voice acting throughout. Take control of the intensity and other features of the sexual action as Caroline’s fantasies expand from simple solo-experiences to wild and even supernatural sexual encounters.



This interactive Erotic Story features 12 extremely immersive, interactive sexual experiences that grow in pleasure and intensity as the story progresses. From simple one-on-one encounters with real people in Caroline’s life, to fantastical, fairy-tale based sexual experiences with supernatural creatures, Caroline’s sexual imagination is truly wild and extraordinary.

This Amazing Interactive Erotic Adventure features:
  • An engaging story that sees a sweet young woman experience the joy of having her innermost sexual fantasies brought to reality.
  • Full English voice-over by a number of talented professional Erotic Voice Actresses and Actors, including hours of voice content by the amazingly talented and Insanely-Sexy Mia Sloane as Caroline
  • The ability to control the intensity of each sexual experience, along with a number of other features like the time-of-day, clothing options, point of view and more
  • Full English Subtitles
  • The ability to play through and re-live every erotic scene over and over from a “scenes” menu.

data.short_description: Caroline's Fantasies is an Interactive Erotic Story about the vivid and intense SEXUAL FANTASIES of a beautiful college coed. Come along for the ride as Caroline is the Beta Tester for a new Virtual Sexual Experience System that brings all of her deepest sexual desires and fantasies to life.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 4590 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 4GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 4500 or better
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 6GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 4590 or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 4GB
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 10 GB available space

  • Processor: Intel Core i7 4500 or better
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 6GB
